name: Sellerboard
oneLiner: Accurate, real-time profit tracking that pays for itself.
summary: Sellerboard is a low-cost profit-analytics tool that gives you an accurate, real-time picture of what you're actually earning per SKU — accounting for 100+ Amazon fee types, COGS, PPC, and refunds. It bundles inventory management, review-request automation, and reimbursement alerts, and even covers Shopify. For the price, the clarity it brings to your numbers is hard to beat.
pros: Accurate per-SKU profit in real time
Very affordable for what it does
bestFor: Any seller who wants to know their true profit per product instead of guessing from top-line sales.
verdict: If you can't say what each SKU actually nets you after fees and ads, Sellerboard fixes that for the price of a couple of coffees a month. One of the highest value-for-money tools a seller can run.
affiliate: Recurring commission via the official affiliate program.
